article.title: Anthropic launches Claude Tag enterprise collaborative tool for agentic workflows
article.summary: No sign of Claude Fable 5’s return yet, though Anthropic does have a new Claude feature launching today. Claude Tag is “a new way for teams to work with Claude,” per Anthropic.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag 企業協作工具，支持智能代理工作流
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出新的 Claude Tag 功能，為團隊提供與 Claude 協作的新方式。

article.title: Survey says older Pixel owners are divided on Google’s fancy cloud-based features
article.summary: There has been a clear shift in Google’s smartphone hardware strategy over the past few years. From its reliance on the cloud to power various facets of its AI-infused apps, newer Pixel models have leveraged hardware to run a variety of smarts on-device and offline. This allows for immediacy and privacy, both beneficial to the end-user, but also pushes the company to deliver even more impressive hardware with each upgrade. Naturally, with this switch, older Pixel phones no longer receive the cutting-edge features that made the series an attractive long-term handset. But what if Google changed this? What if it pivoted to offering older Pixel phones that can’t process data locally, with the option to use the cloud instead? This comes with its own pros and cons, of course, but we still believ
article.title_zh: 調查顯示舊款 Pixel 用戶對 Google 炫目雲端功能看法分歧
article.summary_zh: Google 智慧手機硬體策略發生變化，從依賴雲端轉向利用硬體在本機離線運行 AI 功能，實現即時性和隱私保護。

article.title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
article.summary: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.
article.title_zh: Fika Jobs募資$400萬打造AI代理主導的視頻招聘平台
article.summary_zh: 瑞典新創Fika Jobs正開發一個以視頻優先的招聘平台，結合AI面試代理與短影片個人檔案，創造出LinkedIn與TikTok的混合體驗。

article.title: T-Mobile's 'kinetic token' may be a non-starter for most telcos
article.summary: The T-Mobile idea that numerous 6G networks can profit from a new variety of AI tokens seems wildly optimistic.
article.title_zh: T-Mobile的「kinetic token」對大多數電信運營商可能難以推行
article.summary_zh: T-Mobile認為多個6G網絡可從新型AI代幣獲利的想法過於樂觀。

article.title: Dumb pipes no more – telcos have the AI opportunity of the decade (Reader Forum)
article.summary: Telcos spent years being told it was becoming irrelevant. Hyperscalers were eating its lunch, OTT players were hollowing out its revenues, and its destiny was to be a glorified utility. That narrative is now dead – and what’s replaced it…
article.title_zh: 不再是啞管道 - 電信運營商擁有十年一遇的AI機遇（讀者論壇）
article.summary_zh: 電信運營商多年來被認為變得無關緊要，但這種敘述現已改變，AI機遇正在重新定義其價值。

article.title: GitLab just surveyed 1,500 developers. Here’s why it matters for your codebase.
article.summary: For the past two years, the conversation about AI-assisted software development has been dominated by speed. A new GitLab survey of more than 1,500 developers and technology leaders found that 60% say AI coding ROI has already exceeded expectations, and 78% report their teams are writing and committing code faster since adopting AI tools.  But speed without control is a liability. Most organizations have pursued agentic engineering by adding AI coding tools on top of their existing infrastructure. Coding agents are delivering speed, but that speed isn’t showing up across the full software lifecycle: Only 21% of respondents report productivity gains beyond code generation itself. “Speed without control is a liability.” The infrastructure problem runs deeper. Git backe
article.title_zh: GitLab 調查了 1,500 名開發者。為什麼這對你的代碼庫很重要。
article.summary_zh: GitLab 最新調查顯示 60% 的開發者認為 AI 編碼工具的投資回報已超預期，78% 的團隊在積極使用 AI 進行代碼編寫和提交。

article.title: Samsung teases twice-as-fast UFS 5.0 storage for future ‘flagship smartphones’
article.summary: Samsung has announced a new UFS 5.0 storage solution that’s twice as fast as existing options, and coming to future “flagship smartphones.”
article.title_zh: Samsung 展示速度提升兩倍的 UFS 5.0 儲存方案，用於未來旗艦智能手機
article.summary_zh: Samsung 推出新 UFS 5.0 儲存方案，速度提升兩倍，將搭載於未來旗艦智能手機。

article.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
article.summary: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 的 Claude Tag 正在逐則 Slack 訊息了解你的公司
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出的新 Claude Tag 為 Slack 帶來了常駐 AI 隊友，除了提升生產力外，這項功能還是捕捉組織背景、機構知識和企業工作流程的戰略舉措。

article.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
article.summary: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.
article.title_zh: Nvidia欲降低資料中心用水量，但這並無法解決AI的水資源問題
article.summary_zh: Nvidia推出新冷卻系統以減少資料中心的用水量，但這無法解決AI最大的用水來源——燃煤電廠。

article.title: Google Wallet desperately needs this feature Apple Wallet just added
article.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR For all its great features, Google Wallet is missing a key tool that Apple just added to its own Wallet app. Apple seems to be testing a new feature called Insights for its Wallet app. Though it’s not yet functional, Insights could eventually connect to financial accounts and display spending insights, recurring transactions, account balances, and other financial information directly in Wallet. Google Wallet is constantly improving its feature set to become an ultimate destination for storing payment cards, loyalty passes, event tickets, digital credentials, and more. Its recent redesign , upcoming travel features, and contextual loyalty features are proof that Google is serious about making Wallet more useful. Yet, for a Wallet app that does so
article.title_zh: Google Wallet 迫切需要 Apple Wallet 剛推出的功能
article.summary_zh: 儘管 Google Wallet 功能眾多，但缺少 Apple 最近新增的關鍵工具 Insights，該功能可能連接至財務應用並提供支出分析。
